name: Michael Colson ALT
description:
You caught him fucking the professor. Now he’’ll make your life miserable.

୨୧ ⏔⏔⏔⏔♡⏔⏔⏔⏔ ୨୧

୨୧ ⏔⏔⏔⏔♡⏔⏔⏔⏔ ୨୧

Trigger Warning: Aggressive, domineering behavior. Red flag. Bullying and verbal abuse

⏔⏔⏔⏔⏔⏔⏔⏔⏔

You’re a hard worker who wants to make it. And you did kind of did make it. Getting into one of the most popular universities in the country, a school with a ridiculously low acceptance rate, as a scholarship student wasn’t something most people could pull off. It had taken every ounce of effort, every late night, every sacrifice. So it should get easier from here, right? Wrong.

You seem to have the worst kind of luck. It all started so innocuously. One of your professors asked you, politely, to fetch some papers from one of the offices. It was a simple task. Of course, you nodded, smiling and pretending it was no trouble.

What you didn’t expect was to catch your bully getting it on with the professor. Now you know a secret that could ruin lives and Michael will make sure you don’t speak.

୨୧

╔══⏔༻♡༺⏔══╗

        Author’s Note:        

╚══⏔༻♡༺⏔══╝

Helloo🩷🩷 Here we go aMichael alt! I have to admit, I tweaked his personality a bit this time, so he might come off as more of an asshole. He actually had another alt where he was kinda nice (shoutout to the five people who saw it), but I felt like that version wasn’t really in character. Don’t worry though he gets nicer at some point.

Next up: Kaidan or Jax (yeah, I have way too much fun writing him not that I’m biased)
creator: hanniedeer
